title: hypecoum angustilobum
intro: Hypecoum angustilobum, also known as Chinese honoraria or Chinese bugloss, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant's roots and flowers have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hypecoum angustilobum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve cardiovascular health. Hypecoum angustilobum is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and may be used in herbal remedies for its purported medicinal properties.
